Today @POTUS  & @SecretaryBurgum officially dedicated the Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library. It is one of the gifts to the American people on our 250th anniversary. It pays tribute to the principles, embodied by T.R., that have carried us through good times & tough battles.

These are the same principles that will, for the next 250 years, continue making America a place where men and women are free to pursue big dreams. Adventure to North Dakota and walk in the footsteps of this inspiring leader!! I guarantee you’ll have a good time in our Badlands.
